insights: The market has shown a clear upward trajectory over the last 10 days, consistently breaking above the 30-day average of 990.
Unicorn-tier companies are showing the most stability and growth, suggesting that venture-backed firms are currently more aggressive in new graduate hiring than established FAANG+ entities.
The steady increase in the 7-day average compared to the 30-day average indicates a strengthening momentum that is likely to persist through the next month.
